Off Calendar Oct-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PHARMICARE CO. LTD. Motion to Substitute Attorney. (Substituting Brian H. Song, Esq. in place of John J. Park.) Appearances: Brian H. Song, Esq. Attorney at Law, (408) 748-748-3308 appearing for Moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice And Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PHARMICARE CO. LTD.'S Petition to Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award. Appearances: Ansren Desai, Pro Per appearing (408) 945-4044 for Defendant. There are no other appearances. Mr. Desai did not give notice, pursuant to Local Rule, 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
